'''Siena Pavan''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the short-time wife of [[Lorn Pavan]] and mother to [[Jax Pavan]].

==Behind the scenes==
Although it is never explicitly stated in ''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'', the novel implies that a woman named Siena was Lorn Pavan's last serious relationship. The novel also mentions that he has a son, one over which he appears to have full custody, as he is the one who gives his son over to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Finally, the novel also implies that it was Lorn's discharge from service at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] that sent his life into a tailspin. It was presumed from ''Shadow Hunter'' that "Siena" was Lorn's wife; this was confirmed in ''[[Coruscant Nights I: Jedi Twilight]]''.
